name: Honey Nut Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to the bread machine in the order specified by the manufacturer.
2. Select the raisin bread cycle if available, or use a similar setting.
3. When the machine finishes mixing, add nuts at the beep.
4. Do not use a timer for this recipe.
5. From "The Ultimate Bread Machine Cookbook" by Lacalamita, yields 1 loaf.
